body:
## Summary
- add a bounded native show-phase timeout after `PracticeInterstitialAd` receives `LOADED` and calls `interstitialAd.show()`
- release `interstitialLoadInFlight` on stalled show attempts without consuming `lastInterstitialShowKey`
- harden ad-placement parity guards for the Practice interstitial show timeout and stale AdBanner drift fixtures

## Validation
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' node --test tests/content-ad-placement-route-parity.test.js scripts/monetization.test.js --test-name-pattern "PracticeInterstitial|show timeout|show in flight|OPENED|CLOSED|showKey|AdBanner"`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' node scripts/validate-content.js --focus-ad-placement-route-parity`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run validate:content`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run typecheck -- --pretty false`
- `git diff --check origin/main..HEAD`
title: fix: release stalled practice interstitial shows
